raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The symposium will feature data-driven presentations and discussions on critical topics affecting the Black community.",
    "The event will address healthcare disparities and aim to improve community wellness.",
    "The symposium will examine housing inequities and propose solutions for affordable housing.",
    "The event will foster economic growth and opportunities for Black entrepreneurs.",
    "The discussions will include the pursuit of reparative justice and historical reconciliation.",
    "A $1 million check will be presented from the state of California to the Inland Empire Community Foundation's Black Equity Initiative.",
    "The allocated funds will support nonprofit organizations focused on youth engagement.",
    "The funds will advance knowledge and promote inclusive narratives through data/research and storytelling.",
    "The initiative aims to combat anti-Black racism and support mental health initiatives.",
    "Economic mobility and access to capital will be promoted through the allocated funds."
  ]
```
